summary_en: 4,300,000 shares (7.95% of shares outstanding), ¥3.8B upper limit, acquisition period 18 May 2026 to 17 May 2027, ordinary shares, open-market method.
title_en: Notice of Determination of Matters Concerning Acquisition of Treasury Stock (Acquisition of treasury stock based on Articles of Incorporation provisions under Article 165, Paragraph 2 of the Companies Act)
translation_en_brief: On 15 May 2026, Quants Research Institute Holdings' board of directors resolved to acquire treasury stock under Article 156 of the Companies Act (as applied via Article 165, Paragraph 3). The company will acquire up to 4,300,000 ordinary shares, representing 7.95% of shares outstanding (excluding treasury stock), for a maximum aggregate purchase price of ¥3.8 billion. The acquisition period runs from 18 May 2026 to 17 May 2027 via open-market purchase. The stated purpose is to enhance shareholder returns and capital efficiency. The company notes that current stock price levels do not fully reflect its future earnings potential, and the decision reflects a comprehensive review of recent market conditions and the company's stock performance.
